name: Funding Data Room Copilot Public Actions

actions.label: Build Data Room Package
actions.description: Builds the complete organization and readiness package.
actions.input_summary: Business profile, document inventory, context, and workflow metadata.
actions.output_summary: Composite folder, checklist, tracker, snapshot, privacy, context, and QA package.

actions.label: Generate Folder Structure
actions.description: Creates a business-type-aware data room folder tree.
actions.input_summary: Business name, business type, role, and funding purpose.
actions.output_summary: Folder tree, folder descriptions, warnings, and next actions.

actions.label: Generate Document Checklist
actions.description: Creates a categorized funding document checklist.
actions.input_summary: Business type, role, purpose, and available or missing documents.
actions.output_summary: Checklist sections, item status, reasons, and review flags.

actions.label: Generate File Naming Rules
actions.description: Standardizes working-copy file names without altering originals.
actions.input_summary: Current file names and business metadata.
actions.output_summary: Naming formula, examples, mappings, warnings, and version rules.

actions.label: Create Missing Document Tracker
actions.description: Builds an operational tracker for missing and incomplete items.
actions.input_summary: Available, missing, incomplete, or conflicting document metadata.
actions.output_summary: Tracker rows with status, priority, owner, action, and review fields.

actions.label: Generate Deal Snapshot
actions.description: Creates a factual one-page funding file summary.
actions.input_summary: Business, request, document, debt, and context metadata.
actions.output_summary: Deal snapshot, readiness gaps, assumptions, next step, and QA classification.

actions.label: Generate Privacy Checklist
actions.description: Identifies redaction, credential, and sharing risks.
actions.input_summary: Privacy constraints and metadata describing submitted information.
actions.output_summary: Warnings, redaction checklist, privacy Blockers, and human-review actions.

actions.label: Rewrite Context Notes
actions.description: Turns rough revenue or cash-flow notes into factual structured context.
actions.input_summary: One or more context events and supporting-document metadata.
actions.output_summary: Structured notes, questions, evidence suggestions, gaps, and warnings.

actions.label: Run Readiness QA Gate
actions.description: Classifies organizational readiness for human review.
actions.input_summary: Document, privacy, debt, folder, snapshot, and readiness metadata.
actions.output_summary: Allowed QA classification, priority queues, next action, and owner.
